articles.title: Stocks tumble, Dow confirms correction territory, as Middle East tensions drag

topStories.title: JD Vance, ‘obsessed’ with UFO files, says they're not aliens but something else — Here's what US Vice President thinks
topStories.description: Vance said UFOs weren't aliens, describing this as a Christian understanding of ‘celestial beings who fly around who do weird things to people.’

topStories.title: Stocks tumble, Dow confirms correction territory, as Middle East tensions drag
topStories.description: U.S. stocks plunged Friday, with major indexes hitting seven-month lows as a Middle East war continued to suppress risk appetite. The Dow entered correction territory, down over 10% from its record high. Rising oil prices fueled inflation fears, dampening hopes for Fed rate cuts.

topStories.title: Bank of America to pay $72.5 million to settle lawsuits brought in by Epstein accusers
topStories.description: Lawyers for the bank and the women had told Manhattan-based U.S. District Judge Jed Rakoff this month they had reached a “settlement in principle,” but terms of the deal were not disclosed at the time.

topStories.title: Intense bombing in Tehran, Isfahan
topStories.description: Black smoke is rising over Tehran and Isfahan after early morning US-Israeli airstrikes on the cities.

topStories.title: Am confident Sadiq will work for Cong’s win: DKS
topStories.description: Congress gains support from rebel Sadiq Pailwan for Davangere South by-election, aiming to avoid vote split against BJP contender.

topStories.title: Modi, Trump had 'productive' talks, says US as report claims Musk joined call
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump held a “productive” conversation with Prime Minister Narendra Modi earlier this week, the White House said on Friday.

topStories.title: Tiger Woods arrested on DUI charge after Florida car crash; Trump reacts — Here's all we know
topStories.description: Tiger Woods was arrested for driving under the influence on Friday.He will be detained for at least 8 hours at a local jail before he can post bail. This is Woods' fourth auto-related incident.

topStories.title: Amid Iran War, Trump Says "Cuba Is Next"
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump on Friday said "Cuba is next" during a speech at an investment forum in Miami during which he touted the successes of US military action in Venezuela and Iran.

topStories.title: Iran US War LIVE: Iranian attack on Saudi's Prince Sultan Air Base wounds 12 US soldiers, damages several planes
topStories.description: Iran War News LIVE: The attack involved an Iranian missile as well as drones, coming a day after Trump said Iran has been ‘obliterated’ and Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth said that ‘never in recorded history has a nation’s military been so quickly and so effectively neutralized’, reported AP.

topStories.title: "We Don't Have To Be There For NATO": Trump Slams Allies Over Iran War
topStories.description: Iran War: Trump said he was upset that European NATO countries had declined to provide material support to the US as it nears the fourth week of its ongoing war on Iran.

topStories.title: Trump says US-Israeli war on Iran creating a new Middle East
topStories.description: Donald Trump told a Saudi investment conference that the Middle East will soon be free from Iranian “nuclear blackmail.”

topStories.title: Iran strikes Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia: At least 10 US troops injured, two critical — What we know so far
topStories.description: The development comes a day after US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said that the US could accomplish its military objectives in the war against Iran 'without any ground troops', and amid ongoing talks with Iran.

dailyNews.description: Iranian Red Crescent says more than 92,600 civilian units were damaged across the country in US-Israeli attacks.

dailyNews.title: Tiger Woods Arrested for DUI in Florida Rollover Car Crash
dailyNews.description: Tiger Woods was arrested Friday afternoon for driving under the influence after crashing his vehicle into another car in Jupiter Island, Florida, the Martin County Sheriff’s Office said.

dailyNews.title: Houthis warn ‘fingers on the trigger’ as US-Israel war on Iran continues
dailyNews.description: The Iran-aligned Yemeni group have the ability to target key shipping lanes around the Arabian Peninsula.

dailyNews.title: "We're Negotiating Now": Trump Jokingly Calls Hormuz "Strait Of Trump"
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump on Friday insisted Iran must open up the Strait of Hormuz to oil traffic to make a peace deal -- and dubbed the crucial waterway the "Strait of Trump."

dailyNews.title: ‘Fingers on the trigger’ for military intervention, Houthis warn
dailyNews.description: The Houthis have warned that they are ready for direct military intervention in the US-Israeli war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Tiger Woods charged with DUI after rollover crash in Florida
dailyNews.description: Tiger Woods showed signs of impairment and was arrested at the scene of car crash in which he struck another vehicle.

dailyNews.title: 'My daughter is under the rubble': Inside Tehran as civilian toll of strikes rises
dailyNews.description: One month since the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran, Tehran residents tell the BBC their lives have been devastated.

dailyNews.title: Tiger Woods charged with driving under influence after crash
dailyNews.description: Golfer Tiger Woods is charged with driving under the influence after a car crash in Florida, police say.

dailyNews.title: Guns in the streets as US, Israel intensify month-long attacks across Iran
dailyNews.description: A senior IRGC official in Tehran told state television that children over 12 can join armed patrols and checkpoints.

dailyNews.title: Rubio says US expects to finish Iran war 'in next couple of weeks'
dailyNews.description: Marco Rubio said US allies were open to helping escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz, which Iran has closed and threatened to charge fees for.

dailyNews.title: US Hopes For Iran Meetings "This Week" To End Month-Long War: Trump Envoy
dailyNews.description: US President Trump's special envoy Steve Witkoff said Friday he believes Iran will hold talks with Washington "this week" to end the month-long war in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Mexico’s navy searches for two missing boats involved in Cuba aid convoy
dailyNews.description: The Nuestra America Convoy said that the sailboats were led by 'experienced sailors' with access to safety equipment.

dailyNews.title: Trump orders paycheques for TSA workers as Congress stalls and airport chaos grinds on
dailyNews.description: The late-night vote was a step towards bringing the 40-day partial shutdown - and long security lines at US airports - to an end.

dailyNews.title: Trump touts progress in Iran talks and success in Venezuela, says 'Cuba is next'
dailyNews.description: President says "Cuba is next" after Iran negotiations, success in Venezuela and talks renaming the Strait of Hormuz the "Strait of Trump" at a Miami Beach summit.

dailyNews.title: Carville doubles down on theory Trump will 'walk away' from office after midterms, get pardon from JD Vance
dailyNews.description: Carville doubled down on his theory that Trump will resign after the midterms, suggesting Trump will seek a pardon from JD Vance to avoid potential prosecutions after leaving office.

dailyNews.title: Trump reacts to Tiger Woods' rollover crash as golfer faces DUI charge: ‘Very close friend of mine’
dailyNews.description: Tiger Woods was arrested on a DUI charge weeks before the Masters, and President Donald Trump called the 15-time major winner a close friend in response to the car crash.

dailyNews.title: White House slams ‘trash reporting’ over claims ICE chief hospitalized for stress, yelled at by Trump admin
dailyNews.description: Politico reported that ICE acting Director Todd Lyons was hospitalized for stress linked to Trump's deportation push, but the White House calls it trash reporting.

dailyNews.title: Rogan, Dave Smith speak about how Trump's Iran war broke his coalition, could hand country right back to Dems
dailyNews.description: Joe Rogan and Dave Smith argue Trump's Iran war has shattered his historic 2024 coalition, and Smith warned it could hand the country back to Democrats.

dailyNews.title: At CPAC, the ‘America First’ Crowd Ponders Giving War a Chance
dailyNews.description: The Conservative Political Action Conference has been an America First gathering for years, but with President Trump pursuing war in Iran, organizers have tried to make a shift, with mixed results.

dailyNews.title: Outside Kennedy Center, Jane Fonda and Joan Baez Raise Voices in Protest
dailyNews.description: The pair joined in a gathering of artists and others who denounced censorship and faulted President Trump’s growing influence over the nation’s cultural life.

dailyNews.title: Kennedy Center Performer Asks Judge to Toss Case He Calls ‘Retaliatory’
dailyNews.description: A jazz drummer who called off a performance in protest of the center’s being renamed for President Trump said the president’s allies had sued him as punishment.

dailyNews.title: One Republican Farmer in Wisconsin Is Bitter Over Trump’s Deportations
dailyNews.description: For 20 years, Tim O’Harrow has asked lawmakers to acknowledge that America’s food supply depends on immigrants. Politics went in the other direction.

dailyNews.title: "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" guests for March 29, 2026
dailyNews.description: This week's guests include White House border czar Tom Homan, Democratic Rep. Jim Himes, and former U.S. Surgeon General Dr. Jerome Adams.

dailyNews.title: 2/20: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Supreme Court strikes down Trump's emergency tariffs; U.S. and Canada to face off for gold medal in men's hockey
